api_call.name: API Call
api_call.description: Make a custom API call to EasyIQ

post_data.name: POST Data
post_data.description: JSON formatted post data, if not defined, request will be GET

refresh_data.name: Refresh Data
refresh_data.description: Force refresh of all EasyIQ data

child_id.name: Child ID
child_id.description: Specific child ID to refresh data for (optional, refreshes all if not specified)

error.auth_failed: MitID authentication failed. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This MitID account is already configured

data.mitid_use_token: Use MitID code reader (token) instead of MitID app
data.mitid_identity: Identity number to use (1-based, when several identities exist)

user.description: Aula now requires MitID authentication. Enter your MitID username; you'll authorize the login from your MitID app on the next page (or with a code reader if you enabled the option).
user.title: MitID Authentication

token_credentials.description: Enter your MitID password and the 6-digit code displayed on your MitID code reader device.
token_credentials.title: MitID code reader

authenticate.title: Authenticating with MitID
authenticate.description: Open the link to scan the MitID QR code with your MitID app, or wait while the code-reader login completes.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with MitID
reauth_confirm.description: Your Aula tokens for {username} have expired. Click submit to start a new MitID login.

reauth_error.title: MitID authentication failed
reauth_error.description: The MitID login did not complete. Click submit to try again.

init.description: Configure which EasyIQ features to enable and their update intervals
init.title: EasyIQ Options
